AutoRenew.description: Whether subscription instances are automatically renewed after expiration.

ChargeEndTime.description: Instance billing end time. Time format: YYYY-MM-DD'T'HH:MM:SS'Z'.

ChargeExpireTime.description: Expiration time for subscription instances. Time format: YYYY-MM-DD'T'HH:MM:SS'Z'.

ChargeStartTime.description: Instance billing start time. Time format: YYYY-MM-DD'T'HH:MM:SS'Z'.

ChargeStatus.description: Instance billing status. Includes: Normal: normal, Overdue: pay-as-you-go overdue, Expired: subscription expired.

ChargeType.description: Instance billing type. Supported types: PostPaid: pay-as-you-go, PrePaid: subscription.

OverdueReclaimTime.description: Estimated release time after instance is stopped due to overdue payment. Time format: YYYY-MM-DD'T'HH:MM:SS'Z'.

OverdueTime.description: Instance overdue shutdown time. Time format: YYYY-MM-DD'T'HH:MM:SS'Z'.

EndpointType.description: Access point type of the instance. RabbitMQ instance provides the following access point types: WEB: Web UI access point, AMQP0_9_1: AMQP access point, MQTT: MQTT access point, WEB_MQTT: WEB and MQTT access point, STOMP: STOMP access point.

InternalEndpoint.description: Instance private network access domain name.

InternalIpEndpoint.description: Public service zone IP access point.

NetworkType.description: Network type of the access point. PrivateNetwork indicates private VPC network.

PublicEndpoint.description: Instance public access domain name. Displayed only after public access is enabled.

description: RabbitMQ supports enabling public access. Once enabled, you can access the RabbitMQ instance via the public network.

AccountId.description: Main account ID that created the instance.

ApplyPrivateDNSToPublic.description: Whether public DNS resolution is enabled. true: enabled, false: disabled.

ChargeDetail.description: Instance billing method and related billing information.

IsEncrypted.description: Whether cloud disk encryption is enabled.

ProjectName.description: IAM project the instance belongs to.

StorageSpace.description: Total storage space of the instance, in GiB.

UsedStorageSpace.description: Used storage space of the instance, in GiB.

Version.description: Supported RabbitMQ versions. Currently supported versions include: 3.8.18: RabbitMQ version 3.8.18.

ZoneId.description: Availability zone ID where the instance is located. For high availability instances across AZs, multiple availability zone IDs are returned.
